description: §14.8.7 — the same `<db>` block WITH `tables="users"` present scopes the table set for the shadow DB and fires no E-PA-005. The clean control for the missing-tables reject.
source-test: compiler/src/protect-analyzer.ts (E-PA-005 fire site, step 3: tables= presence)
rationale: protect-analyzer §step3: with a non-empty `tables=` the analyzer parses at least one table name, scopes it, and proceeds to build the shadow DB, so E-PA-005 never fires.
